Neon Soul Chronicles
minting_now.description:
Enter a world where the line between consciousness and code is blurred. Neon Soul: Genesis is a collection of unique, digitally-bred entities captured in the high-voltage streets of a near-future dystopia.

Each character features custom-generated traits, from neural-link goggles to experimental gli

minting_now.name: Aristocrat
minting_now.description: A surreal, aristocratic monkey figure stands at the center of a vibrant, dreamlike scene. Dressed in lavish, vintage-inspired attire with a top hat and ornate jewelry, the character exudes a sense of elegance and mystery. A golden clock embedded on its chest suggests themes of time, identity, and tr

minting_now.name: MPJUniverse "Positive Vibes Only-Let's Fly"
minting_now.description: An American Boy & Australian Girl, a love story that never was sadly. An art piece created on a romantic two night adventure(s) with two strangers that fell in love. This is a Digital Asset that was Created-Designed by M & J, "MPJ".

minting_now.name: Monkey King
minting_now.description: A vibrant, psychedelic reinterpretation of the Monkey King, this NFT blends surreal pop-art aesthetics with regal symbolism. The character—a wide-eyed monkey adorned in a royal coat and a tall hat featuring a clock—sits in a dreamlike setting filled with neon colors, distorted portraits, and theatri

minting_now.name: raccoon dog Guardian of Fortune#002
minting_now.description:
raccoon dog Guardian of Fortune is a symbolic digital spirit inspired by Japanese lucky charms, resilience, and folded paper protection.
This character carries a mysterious red fortune book while wearing a handcrafted origami helmet, representing wishes, persistence, and hidden emotional strength.
I

minting_now.name: Landaks Club
minting_now.description: ‎Landak Club 1/1 Handraw, No roadmap, no promises, Just hype collection

minting_now.name: Burbella in the Sundae Sky
minting_now.description:
Burbella in the Sundae Sky
This is a fantastic and highly imaginative collection where Burbella, a candy bubble, lives and creates her adventures in a world just for children, because they are the ones who dream the unimaginable in their childhood fantasies.
Edited, animated, and improvised using de

minting_now.name: Textura
minting_now.description: Textura is a generative-art by wisstbescheid.

minting_now.name: Ugly Mugs
minting_now.description: Too ugly to ignore. Ugly Mugs is coming to Base.

minting_now.name: NormieLines
minting_now.description: Normieline is a generative NFT project that transforms “normie” culture through GenArt principles. Algorithmically created variations turn everyday identities into unique digital characters, highlighting the individuality hidden within the ordinary.

minting_now.name: Chilling vibe
minting_now.description:
Not your ordinary ghost. Just catching the Chilling Vibe.
Meet the purple spirits who decided to ditch the scaring and start living. Dressed in wigs and glasses, they’re here to master the art of 'Human Cosplay.' Join the chillest community on the Polygon network.

upcoming.name: Apex Cat Yelling
upcoming.description:
🐾 In a world where noise equals power and silence means invisibility, a new elite crew rises — Apex Cats Yelling.

They don’t ask for attention. They take it.
These aren’t just cats.
They are archetypes of rebellion, style, and status.

upcoming.name: Double Tap
upcoming.description: Quick! "Double Tap" for a combo! Across 140 NFTs and over ten categories, "Double Tap" brings together the worlds of martial arts and classic fighting games. Drawing from that shared language of dance and discipline, each work turns kicks, counters, and airborne exchanges into a work of art. Created

upcoming.name: Drafting Ursus
upcoming.description:
Drafting Ursus - Hand drawn line art from the Ursus Universe, living on Ethereum.

Sketch Ursus. Build Universe.

upcoming.name: [Yuki] Shoulder Guards
upcoming.description: ooo oo ah AH! Stop monkey'n around! upcoming.name: "Faces" by Michael Hafftka

upcoming.name: Gift of Time by Manuel Larino
upcoming.description:

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

If you're going to be in Miami for Consensus and work in NFTs you are invited (limited spots availabl...

Pudgy Penguins are returning to Las Vegas for this year’s Licensing Expo. For the third year in a row, we’re excited to represent Web3 and share the floor with some of the world’s greatest IPs from May 19 to 21.
NEWS: teams up with , enabling to potentially reach 500M+ investors across major trading platforms worldwide. Paxos Crypto Brokerage has also added support for PENGU.
Make your move. To all the new players and holders joining Azuki: Welcome to the Garden

From the Alley to the Garden We heard you like to move it. Madagascar. 2271km from north to south. 3 weeks. Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
